products.name: Eco-Friendly Natural T-Shirt
products.description: Our eco-friendly natural t-shirt is made with sustainable materials. We care about the planet and use green manufacturing processes. Join us in being environmentally conscious!

products.name: GOTS Certified Organic Cotton Shirt
products.description: GOTS certified organic cotton shirt. 100% organic fibers, Fair Trade certified factory. Carbon neutral shipping with verified offsets. B Corporation certified.

products.name: Recycled Material Hoodie
products.description: Made with 50% recycled polyester and 30% organic cotton. Working towards carbon neutrality. Partnering with ethical factories.

products.name: Natural Skincare Product
products.description: All-natural ingredients. Green packaging. Eco-conscious brand. Good for you and the environment!

products.name: Fair Trade Coffee
